# Antiassociative algebra in R: introducing the `evitaicossa` package

# ![](reference/figures/evitaicossa.png)

An *algebra* is a vector space equipped with a bilinear product: the
vectors may be multiplied. Algebras may be defined over any field but
here we use the real numbers. An *antiassociative* algebra is an algebra
in which the usual associativity relation for vector multiplication is
replaced by . Antiassociative algebras are nilpotent of nilindex 4: the
product of any four vectors is zero. Antiassociative algebras are the
direct sum of elements of degree 1,2 and 3 (the antiassociativity
condition implies that the degree zero component is trivial, and the
nilpotence ensures that components of degree four or above do not
exist). Thus the general form of an element of an antiassociative
algebra is thus where , , are constants and the are indeterminates.

The `evitaicossa` package provides some R-centric functionality for
working with antiassociative algebras. In an R session, you can install
the released version of the package from
[CRAN](https://CRAN.R-project.org) with:

``` r
# install.packages("evitaicossa")  # uncomment to install the package
library("evitaicossa")             # loads the package 
```

The package includes a single S4 class `aaa` \[for
â€ś**a**nti**a**ssociative **a**lgebraâ€ť\] and a range of functions to
create objects of this class. A good place to start is function
[`raaa()`](https://robinhankin.github.io/evitaicossa/reference/raaa.md),
which creates a random object of class `aaa`:

``` r
(evita <- raaa())
#> free antiassociative algebra element:
#> +1a +3b +2d +3a.b +1c.b +1c.c +1(a.b)a +1(b.b)c +1(b.c)a
(icossa <- raaa())
#> free antiassociative algebra element:
#> +4a +2b +2a.a +2c.c +2d.d +2(b.d)d +1(c.d)a +4(d.b)c
(itna <- raaa())
#> free antiassociative algebra element:
#> +2a +2c +4d +1b.d +2c.b +2c.d +3(b.a)d +3(b.b)c +4(b.c)b
```

Above, we see objects `evita`, `icossa` and `itna` are random
antiassociative algebra elements, with indeterminates `a`, `b`, `c`,
`d`. These objects may be combined with standard arithmetic operations:

``` r
evita+icossa
#> free antiassociative algebra element:
#> +5a +5b +2d +2a.a +3a.b +1c.b +3c.c +2d.d +1(a.b)a +1(b.b)c +1(b.c)a +2(b.d)d
#> +1(c.d)a +4(d.b)c
evita*icossa
#> free antiassociative algebra element:
#> +4a.a +2a.b +12b.a +6b.b +8d.a +4d.b -2(a.a)a +12(a.b)a +6(a.b)b -2(a.c)c
#> -2(a.d)d -6(b.a)a -6(b.c)c -6(b.d)d +4(c.b)a +2(c.b)b +4(c.c)a +2(c.c)b
#> -4(d.a)a -4(d.c)c -4(d.d)d
```

It is possible to verify some of the axioms as follows:

``` r
c(
left_distributive  = evita*(icossa + itna) == evita*icossa + evita*itna,
right_distributive = (evita + icossa)*itna == evita*itna + icossa*itna,
antiassociative    = evita*(icossa*itna)   == -(evita*icossa)*itna
)
#>  left_distributive right_distributive    antiassociative 
#>               TRUE               TRUE               TRUE
```

For further details, see the package vignette

[`vignette("evitaicossa")`](https://robinhankin.github.io/evitaicossa/articles/evitaicossa.md)

# Package index

## All functions

- [`Arith-methods`](https://robinhankin.github.io/evitaicossa/reference/Arith-methods.md)
  [`Arith,aaa,aaa-method`](https://robinhankin.github.io/evitaicossa/reference/Arith-methods.md)
  [`Arith,aaa,numeric-method`](https://robinhankin.github.io/evitaicossa/reference/Arith-methods.md)
  [`Arith,numeric,aaa-method`](https://robinhankin.github.io/evitaicossa/reference/Arith-methods.md)
  [`-,aaa,missing-method`](https://robinhankin.github.io/evitaicossa/reference/Arith-methods.md)
  [`+,aaa,missing-method`](https://robinhankin.github.io/evitaicossa/reference/Arith-methods.md)
  [`aaa_arith_aaa`](https://robinhankin.github.io/evitaicossa/reference/Arith-methods.md)
  [`aaa_arith_numeric`](https://robinhankin.github.io/evitaicossa/reference/Arith-methods.md)
  [`aaa_negative`](https://robinhankin.github.io/evitaicossa/reference/Arith-methods.md)
  [`numeric_arith_aaa`](https://robinhankin.github.io/evitaicossa/reference/Arith-methods.md)
  [`aaa_plus_aaa`](https://robinhankin.github.io/evitaicossa/reference/Arith-methods.md)
  [`aaa_prod_aaa`](https://robinhankin.github.io/evitaicossa/reference/Arith-methods.md)
  [`aaa_plus_numeric`](https://robinhankin.github.io/evitaicossa/reference/Arith-methods.md)
  [`aaa_prod_numeric`](https://robinhankin.github.io/evitaicossa/reference/Arith-methods.md)
  [`aaa_power_numeric`](https://robinhankin.github.io/evitaicossa/reference/Arith-methods.md)
  [`c_aaa_add`](https://robinhankin.github.io/evitaicossa/reference/Arith-methods.md)
  [`c_aaa_prod`](https://robinhankin.github.io/evitaicossa/reference/Arith-methods.md)
  :

  Arithmetic methods for `aaa` objects

- [`Compare-methods`](https://robinhankin.github.io/evitaicossa/reference/Compare-methods.md)
  [`Compare,aaa,aaa-method`](https://robinhankin.github.io/evitaicossa/reference/Compare-methods.md)
  [`Compare,aaa,ANY-method`](https://robinhankin.github.io/evitaicossa/reference/Compare-methods.md)
  [`Compare,aaa,numeric-method`](https://robinhankin.github.io/evitaicossa/reference/Compare-methods.md)
  [`Compare,ANY,aaa-method`](https://robinhankin.github.io/evitaicossa/reference/Compare-methods.md)
  [`Compare,numeric,aaa-method`](https://robinhankin.github.io/evitaicossa/reference/Compare-methods.md)
  [`aaa_compare_aaa`](https://robinhankin.github.io/evitaicossa/reference/Compare-methods.md)
  [`aaa_compare_error`](https://robinhankin.github.io/evitaicossa/reference/Compare-methods.md)
  [`aaa_equal_aaa`](https://robinhankin.github.io/evitaicossa/reference/Compare-methods.md)
  [`c_aaa_equal`](https://robinhankin.github.io/evitaicossa/reference/Compare-methods.md)
  : Comparison methods for antiassociative algebra

- [`s1(`*`<aaa>`*`)`](https://robinhankin.github.io/evitaicossa/reference/Extract.md)
  [`sc(`*`<aaa>`*`)`](https://robinhankin.github.io/evitaicossa/reference/Extract.md)
  [`d1(`*`<aaa>`*`)`](https://robinhankin.github.io/evitaicossa/reference/Extract.md)
  [`d2(`*`<aaa>`*`)`](https://robinhankin.github.io/evitaicossa/reference/Extract.md)
  [`dc(`*`<aaa>`*`)`](https://robinhankin.github.io/evitaicossa/reference/Extract.md)
  [`t1(`*`<aaa>`*`)`](https://robinhankin.github.io/evitaicossa/reference/Extract.md)
  [`t2(`*`<aaa>`*`)`](https://robinhankin.github.io/evitaicossa/reference/Extract.md)
  [`t3(`*`<aaa>`*`)`](https://robinhankin.github.io/evitaicossa/reference/Extract.md)
  [`tc(`*`<aaa>`*`)`](https://robinhankin.github.io/evitaicossa/reference/Extract.md)
  [`single()`](https://robinhankin.github.io/evitaicossa/reference/Extract.md)
  [`double()`](https://robinhankin.github.io/evitaicossa/reference/Extract.md)
  [`triple()`](https://robinhankin.github.io/evitaicossa/reference/Extract.md)
  :

  Extract or Replace Parts of `aaa` objects

- [`show(`*`<aaa>`*`)`](https://robinhankin.github.io/evitaicossa/reference/Show.md)
  [`aaa_show()`](https://robinhankin.github.io/evitaicossa/reference/Show.md)
  : Print method for antiassociative algebra objects

- [`aaa-class`](https://robinhankin.github.io/evitaicossa/reference/aaa-class.md)
  :

  Class `"aaa"`

- [`aaa()`](https://robinhankin.github.io/evitaicossa/reference/aaa.md)
  [`lavter()`](https://robinhankin.github.io/evitaicossa/reference/aaa.md)
  [`as.aaa()`](https://robinhankin.github.io/evitaicossa/reference/aaa.md)
  [`thing_to_aaa()`](https://robinhankin.github.io/evitaicossa/reference/aaa.md)
  :

  Functions to create objects of class `aaa`

- [`allsymbols()`](https://robinhankin.github.io/evitaicossa/reference/allsymbols.md)
  : All symbols in an aaa object

- [`evitaicossa-package`](https://robinhankin.github.io/evitaicossa/reference/evitaicossa-package.md)
  [`evitaicossa`](https://robinhankin.github.io/evitaicossa/reference/evitaicossa-package.md)
  : Antiassociative Algebra

- [`jitter`](https://robinhankin.github.io/evitaicossa/reference/jitter.md)
  [`jitter-methods`](https://robinhankin.github.io/evitaicossa/reference/jitter.md)
  [`jitter,aaa-method`](https://robinhankin.github.io/evitaicossa/reference/jitter.md)
  [`jitter,ANY-method`](https://robinhankin.github.io/evitaicossa/reference/jitter.md)
  [`jitter,disord-method`](https://robinhankin.github.io/evitaicossa/reference/jitter.md)
  [`jitter,aaa-method`](https://robinhankin.github.io/evitaicossa/reference/jitter.md)
  : Jittering aaa objects

- [`linear1()`](https://robinhankin.github.io/evitaicossa/reference/linear.md)
  [`linear2()`](https://robinhankin.github.io/evitaicossa/reference/linear.md)
  [`linear3()`](https://robinhankin.github.io/evitaicossa/reference/linear.md)
  : Linear functions

- [`raaa()`](https://robinhankin.github.io/evitaicossa/reference/raaa.md)
  [`raaaa()`](https://robinhankin.github.io/evitaicossa/reference/raaa.md)
  : Random elements of the free antiassociative algebra

- [`is.zero()`](https://robinhankin.github.io/evitaicossa/reference/zero.md)
  : The additive zero in antiassociative algebras

### All vignettes
